allow: Bash(python -c "import json, sys; d = json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'Shop: {d[\\"name\\"]}'\)")

Bash(python -c "from database import SessionLocal; from models import Shop; s = SessionLocal\(\); shops = s.query\(Shop\).all\(\); print\('\\n'.join\([f'{s.name} \({s.id}\): location_name={s.location_name}' for s in shops]\)\)")

Bash(python -c "from database import SessionLocal; from models import Shop; s = SessionLocal\(\); shops = s.query\(Shop\).all\(\); print\('\\n'.join\([f'{s.id:2}: {s.name:25} location: {s.location_name}' for s in shops]\)\)")

Bash(python -c "from database import SessionLocal; from models import Shop; db = SessionLocal\(\); shops = db.query\(Shop\).all\(\); print\('\\n'.join\([f'{s.id:2}: {s.name:25} location={s.location_name}' for s in shops]\)\)")
Bash(sqlite3 hypermart.db "SELECT id, name, location_name, status FROM shops LIMIT 20;")
Bash(sqlite3 hypermart.db "SELECT id, name, location_name FROM shops;")
